report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides (Tax-Loss Harvesting, Cold Storage Security), created missing OG images for both, fixed Cold Storage OpenGraph metadata, and improved mobile responsiveness on 3 grid layouts.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Cold Storage page: Fixed 3-column multi-sig grid (1fr 1fr 1fr → auto-fit minmax(200px, 1fr)) for mobile stacking
Cold Storage page: Fixed 2-column hot/cold comparison grid (1fr 1fr → auto-fit minmax(280px, 1fr)) for mobile stacking
Cold Storage page: Fixed 2-column related links grid (1fr 1fr → auto-fit minmax(240px, 1fr)) for mobile stacking
Cold Storage page: Added missing OpenGraph images array and Twitter card metadata for social sharing
Cold Storage page: Added canonical URL to OpenGraph metadata
Tax-Loss Harvesting page: Confirmed responsive — already uses Tailwind md:grid-cols-2 breakpoints correctly

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-tax-loss-harvesting-guide-2026 (1200x630) — dark theme with gains/loss bar chart, Form 8949 icon, Tax Strategy badge
OG image: cold-storage-seed-phrase-security-guide-2026 (1200x630) — dark theme with shield icon, hardware wallet outline, seed phrase grid, Security badge

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-tax-loss-harvesting-guide-2026 — Pass (good responsive layout, proper breadcrumbs, structured data, BackToTop)
/learn/cold-storage-seed-phrase-security-guide-2026 — 4 fixes applied (mobile grids, OG metadata, Twitter card)
